questions.text: A polygon with 4 sides is called a:
questions.explanation: A quadrilateral is a polygon with 4 sides and 4 angles. Examples include squares, rectangles, and rhombuses.
All squares are rectangles because they have 4 right angles and opposite sides are equal. But not all rectangles are squares.

questions.correctAnswer: A polygon with all sides equal and all angles equal.
questions.explanation: A regular polygon has all sides of equal length and all interior angles of equal measure. Example: equilateral triangle, square.

questions.text: A triangle with all sides equal is called an ________ triangle.
questions.explanation: An equilateral triangle has all three sides equal and all three angles equal to 60 degrees.
